name: io.github.smaniches/uniprot-mcp
description: Reference-quality Model Context Protocol server for the UniProt protein knowledgebase. 38 tools across 8 families: search/lookup, structural (PDB, AlphaFold pLDDT), variants & disease (ClinVar bridge, position lookup, OMIM), position-aware features (active sites, signal peptides, modified residues), composition dossier (sequence chemistry, drug-target context), orthology, local cache & replay, and per-query provenance verification (release-aware SHA-256 of canonical bytes). Every response carries a verifiable provenance record (UniProt release number, retrieval timestamp, resolved URL, SHA-256 digest).
